title: Federated CI Credential Exposure Response Policy

approvalRules.reason: Revoking active sessions can disrupt production and preview workflows.
IAM trust-policy changes can interrupt deployments.
Notification requires verified customer-impact scope and legal review.

customerImpactRules: Do not claim confirmed breach until logs or downstream telemetry show customer records were returned to an unauthorized actor.
If customer records were returned but actor identity is unresolved, classify as suspected exposure and continue evidence collection.
External notification is deferred until Legal approves scope and wording.

severityRules.condition: Sensitive customer endpoints were accessed with a federated production credential from an untrusted workflow.
Confirmed unauthorized exfiltration, active abuse, or inability to contain the federated credential.
